title: Counters
noGroupsDescription: Counter groups bundle related numeric values — like HP, ammo, or scores — that you can increment, decrement, or set directly.
deleteGroupConfirm: The counter group and its counters will be sent to the trash. You can restore it from Settings → Trash before the retention period ends.
name: Name
removeCounterConfirm: Remove this counter from the group?
counterFormDescription: Configure the counter's value, bounds, step, and how it's displayed.
viewModeRequiresBounds: Progress bar and segmented clock require both min and max.
resetAllConfirm: Reset every counter in this group to its initial value?

duplicate.title: Duplicate group
duplicate.description: Create a copy of this group with all of its counters and their current values.
duplicate.dialogDescription: Name the new copy. All counters and their values are copied.

noCountersDescription: Add counters to start tracking values.
notFoundDescription: The counter group you're looking for does not exist or has been removed.
noAccessDescription: You do not have permission to view this counter group.

focus.notFound: Counter not found in this group

settingsDescription: Manage counter group details, access, and advanced options.
accessDescription: Control who can view and edit this counter group.
dangerZoneDescription: Destructive actions. Deleted groups go to the trash and can be restored before the retention period ends.
rolePermissionsDescription: Grant access to this counter group based on Mythforge roles.

filters.heading: Filters
filters.noMatchingGroups: No counter groups match your filters.
